title: Google Sheets column name issue due to newline
symptom: When using the Google Sheets node to append or update rows, only the first column's data is outputted. Other columns do not receive any data.
not_this_if: Column names are formatted correctly without newlines
root_cause: n8n does not recognize column names that contain newline characters, which prevents data from being appended or updated correctly in those columns. This can lead to incomplete data operations when interacting with Google Sheets.
fix_steps: Check the column names in your Google Sheet for any newline characters.
Remove any newline characters from the column names.
Retry the append or update operation in n8n.
agent_instruction: Ensure all column names in your Google Sheet do not contain newline characters and retry the operation.
